LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND TO DISMISS THIS CASE IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. THE COURT WILL SIGN THE PROPOSED ORDER SUBMITTED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO CSR#8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM (302/HEK)

calendar.matters:
MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Dec-19-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Capital One Bank (USA) N.A.'s motion to set aside the default and default judgment and to dismiss this case is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. The court will sign the proposed order submitted with the moving papers. Order is signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/HEK)
